title: Skills gap: build HubSpot/CRM AI integration playbook
description: First action: research HubSpot AI/API/workflow patterns and create `skills/hubspot-crm-ai/SKILL.md` with lead routing, ticket triage, renewal risk, and sales ops workflow templates. Why it matters: HubSpot is a stronger SMB expansion wedge than Salesforce in some consulting lanes, and current market demand rewards CRM/data/workflow integration fluency. Done: skill includes fit criteria, auth/safety notes, workflow templates, proof artifacts, and at least one NYC SMB use case.
